title: CME Group Inc. (CME)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on CME Group using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what CME is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-2cjgdixa>
CME Group continues to maintain high FCF generation. Revenue has shown resilient single-digit to low-double-digit growth, but operational leverage is exceptional. A 10% cash flow expansion reasonably balances consistent volume growth and their incredibly robust margin profile.
